title: Saumay Bhasin joins Goyel & Goyal as Partner to lead Frontier Technologies practice
description: Saumay Bhasin has joined Goyel & Goyal as a Partner to lead the firm’s Technology, Media, and Frontier Technologies practice.Bhasin is a 2014 alumnus of West Bengal National University of Juridical SciencesWith over 12 years of experience, Bhasin's practice spans data privacy, gaming, Web3, defence, fintech, whitecollar crime, and corporate investigations, with additional experience across highly regulated sectors including drones, pharma and life sciences, and media and entertainment.Bhasin
